deployment_summary: Coordinated kill-switch window (Nuno present + authorised Option 1). Pre-flight: tagged rollback image guvfx-prod-guvfx-backend:rollback-preBrokerSymbol (342d198f9008); pg_dump preBrokerSymbol_20260707T130849Z.sql.gz (1.3MB, gzip OK); backed up host worker script + the box bridge (mt5_signal_bridge.py.bak.preBrokerSymbol).
Kill-switch ENGAGED (kill_reason=kill_switch_engaged) + 31-line crontab backed up and backend-exec crons paused for the window.

Windows bridge: staged the new symbol-agnostic bridge to C:\GuvFX\mt5_signal_bridge.py via SSH (sha256 c355d688 verified byte-identical on the box); Nuno restarted it via RDP (start_signal_bridge.bat) — PREFLIGHT PASSED, startup log now 'Symbol validation: MT5-native (symbol_info/symbol_select; no static allowlist)'; /health {ok:true}.

Backend: ~/guvfx-app checked out 6000bce; rsync backend/ -> ~/guvfx-prod/backend (scoped); docker build -> image 4da843172065; migrate execution.0015_brokerinstrument applied; recreated guvfx-backend + guvfx-mt5-trade-ingest-worker + guvfx-mt5-shadow-worker on the new image; updated the bind-mounted worker script /srv/guvfx/worker_scripts/mt5_trade_ingest_worker.py (28960->31103 B, provider_symbol forwarding).
Broker sync: manage.py sync_broker_instruments --account 1 -> seen=84 created=84 updated=0 disabled=0 (no order).
Nightly sync cron installed (deploy/broker-symbol-sync/install_broker_sync_cron.sh, '17 2 * * *' acct 1) + crontab restored (6 backend-exec lines) + kill-switch released -> exact prior armed state.

ROLLBACK LEFT IN PLACE: docker tag guvfx-prod-guvfx-backend:rollback-preBrokerSymbol :latest + recreate; box bridge mt5_signal_bridge.py.bak.preBrokerSymbol; host worker .bak.preBrokerSymbol; crontab.bak.preBrokerSymbol; pg_dump.
btcusd_pip_fix: intelligence/trade_result_producer.py::_pip_size gained a crypto branch (BTC/ETH/... -> Decimal('1')). Verified LIVE in the deployed backend: _pip_size(BTCUSD)=1, XAUUSD=0.1, NZDJPY=0.01, EURUSD=0.0001. A BTCUSD 63200->63450 move now renders ~+250 pips (was ~+2,500,000). Display-only; P&L is broker-sourced.

expected_results: The registry + MT5-native bridge + provider_symbol-forwarding worker are deployed to prod so every broker-supported Wayond symbol (not just the baseline three) is eligible for autonomous demo execution, subject to the unchanged risk gates.
A broker sync populates the BrokerInstrument cache; all 10 historical Wayond symbols resolve to an exact broker symbol.

Each symbol validates end-to-end via order_check DRY-RUN only (order_send NOT called); BTCUSD specifically proven (provider_symbol=BTCUSD, broker_symbol resolved, order_check ok, no order_send, pips display sane).
A nightly sync cron + staleness visibility are installed. No order placed, no Telegram sent, and the prior armed state is restored exactly.
commands: prod: docker compose run --rm guvfx-backend python manage.py migrate --plan  (only 0015, additive)
prod: docker compose run --rm guvfx-backend python manage.py migrate execution
prod: docker compose up -d --force-recreate --no-deps guvfx-backend guvfx-mt5-trade-ingest-worker
prod: docker compose exec -T guvfx-backend python manage.py sync_broker_instruments --account 1
prod: docker compose exec -T guvfx-backend python manage.py broker_instrument_status --account 1
prod: POST /mt5/order_check (X-GuvFX-Agent-Token) for all 10 symbols — order_send NOT called
actual_results: Registry resolution (post-sync): all 10 Wayond symbols accepted=True reason=broker_symbol_exact, broker_symbol==provider_symbol.
order_check dry-run: all 10 ok=True retcode=0 order_send_called=False (live market prices captured).
BrokerInstrument acct#1: 84 rows, 84 enabled, 0 disabled; staleness age=0.0h OK.
ExecutionJob total = 50 before and after (NO order created); no Telegram sent; provider wayond ARMED unchanged.
Deployed backend image 4da843172065; bridge /health {ok:true}; _pip_size crypto branch live.
Armed state restored EXACTLY: auto=True mode=DEMO kill=False provider=ARMED (== pre-window reference).
artefact_locations: backend/mt5_trade_ingest_worker.py (deployed to /srv/guvfx/worker_scripts/ on the prod host)
deploy/broker-symbol-sync/ (nightly cron overlay, installed on prod host)
limitations: Now that the system is armed + BTCUSD-eligible with the new bridge, the NEXT genuine tradeable Wayond signal (incl. frequent BTCUSD) will autonomously fire the first REAL demo order_send (Nuno's accepted Option-1 consequence). The guarded watcher detects the first WAY PLACE_ORDER, disarms the decisive gate, and hands off for the supervised verify/notify/evidence/disarm sequence. This packet itself placed NO order.
EURAUD/USDCHF are technically READY (broker-supported exact, order_check ok) but were DISCOVERED in prod and remain a PM scope decision.
The Windows bridge is manually managed (not git); rollback is the .bak.preBrokerSymbol file + restart. The bridge source-of-truth remains outside this repo.
order_check is a broker-side dry-run validation (no order_send); it does not guarantee a subsequent real order_send would fill identically (market/margin can move).
